addons.nameJa: アクセシビリティチェッカー
addons.description: WCAGコンプライアンスチェック、色のコントラスト比分析、アクセシブルな色の提案機能。デザインが誰にでも使いやすいかチェックできます。
addons.descriptionEn: Check WCAG compliance, analyze color contrast ratios, and get suggestions for accessible color combinations. Ensure your designs are usable by everyone, including people with visual impairments, directly within Adobe Express.
addons.descriptionJa: WCAGコンプライアンスチェック、色のコントラスト比分析、アクセシブルな色の提案機能。デザインが誰にでも使いやすいかチェックできます。
addons.descriptionKo: WCAG 준수 여부 확인, 색상 대비 비율 분석, 접근성 높은 색상 제안 기능을 제공합니다. 시각 장애인을 포함한 모든 사람이 사용하기 쉬운 디자인인지 Adobe Express에서 바로 확인할 수 있습니다.
keywords: ユニバーサルデザイン
keywordsJa: ユニバーサルデザイン

addons.categoryJa: 広告・マーケティング
addons.description: Amazon広告を直接作成、コンプライアンスチェック、公開まで一貫して実行できます。
addons.descriptionEn: Create Amazon Ads directly within Adobe Express, check compliance requirements, and publish your campaigns seamlessly. Streamline your entire Amazon advertising workflow from design to deployment without switching between tools.
addons.descriptionJa: Amazon広告を直接作成、コンプライアンスチェック、公開まで一貫して実行できます。
addons.descriptionKo: Adobe Express에서 직접 Amazon 광고를 제작하고, 컴플라이언스 요건을 확인하며, 캠페인을 원활하게 게시할 수 있습니다. 도구를 전환하지 않고 디자인부터 게시까지 Amazon 광고 워크플로우 전체를 간소화합니다.

addons.description: デザインのどこが目を引くか、ユーザーの注目度を分析してマーケティング効果を最大化します。
addons.descriptionEn: Analyze where users focus their attention in your designs using AI-powered attention heatmaps. Maximize marketing effectiveness by understanding which elements capture the most visual interest before publishing.
addons.descriptionJa: デザインのどこが目を引くか、ユーザーの注目度を分析してマーケティング効果を最大化します。
addons.descriptionKo: AI 기반 주목도 히트맵을 사용하여 디자인의 어느 부분에 사용자 시선이 집중되는지 분석합니다. 게시 전에 어떤 요소가 가장 많은 시각적 관심을 끄는지 파악해 마케팅 효과를 극대화하세요.

addons.description: 大量のバーコードを一度に生成できます。在庫管理や商品ラベル作成に最適。
addons.descriptionEn: Generate large quantities of barcodes in a single operation. Ideal for inventory management, product labeling, and retail workflows where you need to produce hundreds or thousands of unique codes efficiently.
addons.descriptionJa: 大量のバーコードを一度に生成できます。在庫管理や商品ラベル作成に最適。
addons.descriptionKo: 한 번의 작업으로 대량의 바코드를 생성할 수 있습니다. 재고 관리, 제품 라벨링, 수백~수천 개의 고유 코드를 효율적으로 생성해야 하는 소매 워크플로우에 이상적입니다.

addons.nameJa: 色覚異常シミュレーター
addons.description: 色覚異常の方にどう見えるかシミュレーションできます。より多くの人に伝わるデザインを作成。
addons.descriptionEn: Simulate how your design appears to people with various types of color blindness. Create more inclusive designs that communicate effectively to a wider audience by previewing multiple color vision deficiency conditions.
addons.descriptionJa: 色覚異常の方にどう見えるかシミュレーションできます。より多くの人に伝わるデザインを作成。
addons.descriptionKo: 다양한 유형의 색맹을 가진 사람들에게 디자인이 어떻게 보이는지 시뮬레이션합니다. 여러 색각 이상 조건을 미리 보고 더 넓은 시청자에게 효과적으로 전달되는 포용적인 디자인을 만드세요.

addons.nameJa: コントラストチェッカー
addons.description: テキストと背景のコントラスト比をチェックし、読みやすさを確保します。
addons.descriptionEn: Check the contrast ratio between text and background colors to ensure readability for all users. Instantly verify whether your design meets WCAG AA or AAA accessibility standards for legible, inclusive content.
addons.descriptionJa: テキストと背景のコントラスト比をチェックし、読みやすさを確保します。
addons.descriptionKo: 텍스트와 배경색 간의 대비 비율을 확인하여 모든 사용자가 읽기 쉬운 콘텐츠를 만드세요. 디자인이 WCAG AA 또는 AAA 접근성 기준을 충족하는지 즉시 확인할 수 있습니다.

addons.description: Dropboxからファイルを直接追加したり、作成したデザインを保存できます。
addons.descriptionEn: Add files directly from your Dropbox account or save your Adobe Express designs back to Dropbox with ease. Seamlessly bridge your cloud storage and creative workflow without leaving the Express panel.
addons.descriptionJa: Dropboxからファイルを直接追加したり、作成したデザインを保存できます。
addons.descriptionKo: Dropbox 계정에서 파일을 직접 추가하거나 Adobe Express 디자인을 Dropbox에 손쉽게 저장하세요. Express 패널을 벗어나지 않고 클라우드 스토리지와 크리에이티브 워크플로우를 원활하게 연결합니다.

addons.description: Boxからファイルを直接追加したり、作成したデザインを保存できます。
addons.descriptionEn: Access and add files from your Box account directly into Adobe Express, or save your finished designs back to Box for enterprise-grade secure storage. Perfect for teams and businesses using Box for content management.
addons.descriptionJa: Boxからファイルを直接追加したり、作成したデザインを保存できます。
addons.descriptionKo: Box 계정의 파일을 Adobe Express에 직접 추가하거나, 완성된 디자인을 Box에 저장하여 엔터프라이즈급 보안 스토리지를 활용하세요. 콘텐츠 관리에 Box를 사용하는 팀과 기업에 적합합니다.

addons.description: Google Driveからファイルを直接追加したり、作成したデザインを保存できます。
addons.descriptionEn: Add files from Google Drive directly into your Adobe Express projects, or save your designs back to Google Drive for easy sharing and collaboration. Integrate your Google workspace seamlessly with your creative process.
addons.descriptionJa: Google Driveからファイルを直接追加したり、作成したデザインを保存できます。
addons.descriptionKo: Google Drive의 파일을 Adobe Express 프로젝트에 직접 추가하거나, 디자인을 Google Drive에 저장하여 손쉽게 공유하고 협업하세요. Google 워크스페이스와 크리에이티브 프로세스를 원활하게 통합합니다.

addons.description: OneDriveからファイルを直接追加したり、作成したデザインを保存できます。
addons.descriptionEn: Connect your Microsoft OneDrive account to Adobe Express, add files directly to your projects, and save completed designs back to OneDrive. Ideal for Microsoft 365 users who want seamless integration with their existing workflow.
addons.descriptionJa: OneDriveからファイルを直接追加したり、作成したデザインを保存できます。
addons.descriptionKo: Microsoft OneDrive 계정을 Adobe Express에 연결하고, 파일을 프로젝트에 직접 추가하며, 완성된 디자인을 OneDrive에 저장하세요. 기존 워크플로우와 원활한 통합을 원하는 Microsoft 365 사용자에게 이상적입니다.

addons.description: AIでリアルな音声を生成。多言語対応で、自分の声を使った音声作成も可能です。
addons.descriptionEn: Generate realistic AI voices for your projects with multilingual support. Create professional narrations, voiceovers, and audio content using your own voice or a variety of AI-generated voice profiles across multiple languages.
addons.descriptionJa: AIでリアルな音声を生成。多言語対応で、自分の声を使った音声作成も可能です。
addons.descriptionKo: AI로 사실적인 음성을 생성하세요. 다국어 지원으로 여러 언어의 전문적인 나레이션, 보이스오버, 오디오 콘텐츠를 자신의 목소리 또는 다양한 AI 음성 프로필로 만들 수 있습니다.

addons.description: ロイヤリティフリーの高品質音楽ライブラリ。動画やプレゼンに最適な音楽を簡単に追加。
addons.descriptionEn: Access a premium royalty-free music library and easily add the perfect soundtrack to your videos and presentations. Browse thousands of high-quality tracks across multiple genres to elevate your Adobe Express projects.
addons.descriptionJa: ロイヤリティフリーの高品質音楽ライブラリ。動画やプレゼンに最適な音楽を簡単に追加。
addons.descriptionKo: 프리미엄 로열티 프리 음악 라이브러리에 접근하여 동영상과 프레젠테이션에 완벽한 사운드트랙을 손쉽게 추가하세요. 다양한 장르의 수천 개 고품질 트랙을 탐색하여 Adobe Express 프로젝트를 한층 돋보이게 만드세요.

addons.description: フリップブック（ページめくり式のデジタル冊子）を作成・配信できます。
addons.descriptionEn: Create and distribute interactive flipbooks and digital publications directly from Adobe Express. Transform your designs into page-turning digital brochures, catalogs, and magazines with an engaging reader experience.
addons.descriptionJa: フリップブック（ページめくり式のデジタル冊子）を作成・配信できます。
addons.descriptionKo: Adobe Express에서 인터랙티브 플립북과 디지털 출판물을 직접 제작하고 배포하세요. 디자인을 페이지를 넘기는 디지털 브로셔, 카탈로그, 잡지로 변환하여 매력적인 독자 경험을 제공합니다.

addons.nameJa: テキストグラデーション
addons.categoryJa: デザイン・テキスト効果
addons.description: 美しいグラデーションテキスト効果を簡単に作成できます。
addons.descriptionEn: Easily apply beautiful gradient effects to your text in Adobe Express. Choose from a wide range of color combinations and directions to create eye-catching typography that elevates your design.
addons.descriptionJa: 美しいグラデーションテキスト効果を簡単に作成できます。
addons.descriptionKo: Adobe Express에서 텍스트에 아름다운 그라데이션 효과를 손쉽게 적용하세요. 다양한 색상 조합과 방향 중에서 선택하여 디자인을 돋보이게 하는 눈길을 끄는 타이포그래피를 만드세요.

addons.nameJa: テキストグラデーション Pro
addons.categoryJa: デザイン・テキスト効果
addons.description: より高度なグラデーションテキスト効果を作成できるPro版。
addons.descriptionEn: The professional version of Text Gradient with advanced controls for creating stunning gradient text effects. Access more color stops, blending modes, and fine-grained customization options for premium typography results.
addons.descriptionJa: より高度なグラデーションテキスト効果を作成できるPro版。
addons.descriptionKo: 멋진 그라데이션 텍스트 효과를 만들기 위한 고급 컨트롤을 갖춘 Text Gradient의 프로 버전입니다. 더 많은 색상 포인트, 블렌딩 모드, 세밀한 커스터마이징 옵션으로 프리미엄 타이포그래피 결과를 얻으세요.

addons.description: オープンソースのイラストライブラリ。多彩なイラストをプロジェクトに追加できます。
addons.descriptionEn: Access an open-source library of beautiful, customizable illustrations and add them to your Adobe Express projects. Find the perfect illustration for any topic and customize the primary color to match your brand.
addons.descriptionJa: オープンソースのイラストライブラリ。多彩なイラストをプロジェクトに追加できます。
addons.descriptionKo: 아름답고 커스터마이징 가능한 오픈 소스 일러스트레이션 라이브러리에 접근하여 Adobe Express 프로젝트에 추가하세요. 어떤 주제에도 완벽한 일러스트레이션을 찾고 브랜드에 맞게 주요 색상을 커스터마이징하세요.

addons.description: 3Dイラストやアートワークを追加できます。
addons.descriptionEn: Add stunning 3D illustrations and artwork to your Adobe Express projects. Enhance your designs with premium three-dimensional visual assets that bring depth and a modern aesthetic to any creative work.
addons.descriptionJa: 3Dイラストやアートワークを追加できます。
addons.descriptionKo: Adobe Express 프로젝트에 멋진 3D 일러스트레이션과 아트워크를 추가하세요. 깊이감과 현대적인 미학을 더하는 프리미엄 3D 시각적 자산으로 디자인을 향상시키세요.

addons.description: 10万点以上の高品質アイコンライブラリ。あらゆるデザインに対応。
addons.descriptionEn: Access a library of over 100,000 high-quality icons covering every design need. Browse a vast collection of consistent, professionally crafted icons across numerous categories and styles to enhance any project.
addons.descriptionJa: 10万点以上の高品質アイコンライブラリ。あらゆるデザインに対応。
addons.descriptionKo: 모든 디자인 요구를 충족하는 10만 개 이상의 고품질 아이콘 라이브러리에 접근하세요. 수많은 카테고리와 스타일에 걸쳐 일관성 있고 전문적으로 제작된 방대한 아이콘 컬렉션을 탐색하세요.

addons.description: 多様なアイコンセットを提供。プロジェクトに合ったアイコンが見つかります。
addons.descriptionEn: Discover a diverse universe of icon sets for every project style. Find the perfect icon from a curated collection of vector assets that cover a wide range of themes, industries, and visual styles.
addons.descriptionJa: 多様なアイコンセットを提供。プロジェクトに合ったアイコンが見つかります。
addons.descriptionKo: 모든 프로젝트 스타일에 맞는 다양한 아이콘 세트를 발견하세요. 다양한 테마, 산업, 시각적 스타일을 아우르는 엄선된 벡터 에셋 컬렉션에서 완벽한 아이콘을 찾아보세요.

addons.description: 3Dアセットをプロジェクトにインポートできます。
addons.descriptionEn: Import 3D assets directly into your Adobe Express projects. Bring in three-dimensional models and objects to create visually rich, dynamic designs that stand out with depth and realism.
addons.descriptionJa: 3Dアセットをプロジェクトにインポートできます。
addons.descriptionKo: 3D 에셋을 Adobe Express 프로젝트에 직접 임포트하세요. 3D 모델과 오브젝트를 가져와 깊이감과 사실감으로 돋보이는 시각적으로 풍부하고 역동적인 디자인을 만드세요.

addons.description: SNS投稿がどう表示されるかプレビュー確認できます。
addons.descriptionEn: Preview how your designs will appear when posted on various social media platforms including Instagram, Twitter, and Facebook. Ensure your content looks perfect across all channels before publishing.
addons.descriptionJa: SNS投稿がどう表示されるかプレビュー確認できます。
addons.descriptionKo: Instagram, Twitter, Facebook 등 다양한 소셜 미디어 플랫폼에 게시했을 때 디자인이 어떻게 표시되는지 미리 확인하세요. 게시 전에 모든 채널에서 콘텐츠가 완벽하게 보이도록 확인하세요.

addons.description: TikTokコンテンツ作成をAIがサポート。
addons.descriptionEn: Let AI assist you in creating compelling TikTok content within Adobe Express. Get intelligent suggestions for scripts, captions, and visual elements optimized for the TikTok platform and its audience.
addons.descriptionJa: TikTokコンテンツ作成をAIがサポート。
addons.descriptionKo: Adobe Express에서 AI가 매력적인 TikTok 콘텐츠 제작을 지원합니다. TikTok 플랫폼과 사용자에게 최적화된 스크립트, 캡션, 시각적 요소에 대한 지능적인 제안을 받으세요.

addons.description: TikTok用商用音楽ライブラリにアクセスできます。
addons.descriptionEn: Access TikTok's commercial music library directly within Adobe Express. Find and add licensed tracks cleared for business use on TikTok, eliminating copyright concerns when creating branded content for the platform.
addons.descriptionJa: TikTok用商用音楽ライブラリにアクセスできます。
addons.descriptionKo: Adobe Express에서 TikTok 상업용 음악 라이브러리에 직접 접근하세요. TikTok 비즈니스 사용이 허가된 라이선스 트랙을 찾아 추가하여 플랫폼용 브랜드 콘텐츠 제작 시 저작권 문제를 해소하세요.

addons.description: リアルなモックアップ（実機イメージ）を簡単作成。プレゼンに最適。
addons.descriptionEn: Easily create realistic device and product mockups directly in Adobe Express. Showcase your designs in real-world contexts using a wide variety of device frames and scene templates, perfect for client presentations and portfolios.
addons.descriptionJa: リアルなモックアップ（実機イメージ）を簡単作成。プレゼンに最適。
addons.descriptionKo: Adobe Express에서 직접 사실적인 디바이스 및 제품 목업을 손쉽게 만드세요. 다양한 디바이스 프레임과 장면 템플릿을 사용하여 실제 환경에서 디자인을 선보이세요. 클라이언트 프레젠테이션과 포트폴리오에 완벽합니다.

addons.nameJa: クリッピングマスク Pro
addons.description: 高度なクリッピングマスク機能で画像を自由に切り抜き。
addons.descriptionEn: Apply advanced clipping mask techniques to cut out and shape images with precision in Adobe Express. Create sophisticated composites and masked layouts that go beyond basic cropping for more dynamic visual results.
addons.descriptionJa: 高度なクリッピングマスク機能で画像を自由に切り抜き。
addons.descriptionKo: Adobe Express에서 고급 클리핑 마스크 기법을 적용하여 이미지를 정밀하게 잘라내고 모양을 만드세요. 기본 자르기를 넘어 정교한 합성 및 마스크 레이아웃으로 더욱 역동적인 시각적 결과물을 만드세요.

addons.description: スペースを効率的に調整・配置するレイアウトツール。
addons.descriptionEn: Efficiently manage spacing, alignment, and layout distribution in Adobe Express. Organize and arrange design elements with precision to achieve clean, balanced compositions without tedious manual adjustments.
addons.descriptionJa: スペースを効率的に調整・配置するレイアウトツール。
addons.descriptionKo: Adobe Express에서 간격, 정렬, 레이아웃 분포를 효율적으로 관리하세요. 지루한 수동 조정 없이 정밀하게 디자인 요소를 정리하고 배치하여 깔끔하고 균형 잡힌 구성을 만드세요.

addons.description: ブランドスタイルガイドに簡単アクセス。一貫性のあるデザインを維持。
addons.descriptionEn: Quickly access your brand's style guide assets directly in Adobe Express to maintain design consistency across all your work. Manage brand colors, fonts, and logos in one place to ensure every design stays on-brand.
addons.descriptionJa: ブランドスタイルガイドに簡単アクセス。一貫性のあるデザインを維持。
addons.descriptionKo: Adobe Express에서 브랜드 스타일 가이드 에셋에 빠르게 접근하여 모든 작업에서 디자인 일관성을 유지하세요. 브랜드 색상, 폰트, 로고를 한 곳에서 관리하여 모든 디자인이 브랜드에 맞게 유지되도록 하세요.

addons.description: Frontifyブランド資産管理プラットフォームと連携。
addons.descriptionEn: Connect Adobe Express with the Frontify brand management platform to access your centralized brand assets, guidelines, and templates. Keep your team aligned and ensure brand consistency across all creative output.
addons.descriptionJa: Frontifyブランド資産管理プラットフォームと連携。
addons.descriptionKo: Adobe Express를 Frontify 브랜드 관리 플랫폼과 연결하여 중앙화된 브랜드 에셋, 가이드라인, 템플릿에 접근하세요. 팀의 일관성을 유지하고 모든 크리에이티브 산출물에서 브랜드 일관성을 보장하세요.

addons.description: Bynderデジタルアセット管理システムと連携。
addons.descriptionEn: Connect Adobe Express to the Bynder digital asset management system and access your organization's approved media assets directly. Streamline creative workflows by keeping all approved brand assets easily accessible from within Express.
addons.descriptionJa: Bynderデジタルアセット管理システムと連携。
addons.descriptionKo: Adobe Express를 Bynder 디지털 자산 관리 시스템에 연결하고 조직의 승인된 미디어 에셋에 직접 접근하세요. Express 내에서 승인된 모든 브랜드 에셋에 손쉽게 접근하여 크리에이티브 워크플로우를 간소화하세요.

addons.description: テキストから高品質なボイスオーバーを生成。
addons.descriptionEn: Generate high-quality, studio-grade voiceovers from text using WellSaid Labs' AI voice technology. Choose from a diverse set of realistic voice avatars to create professional narrations for videos, e-learning, and presentations.
addons.descriptionJa: テキストから高品質なボイスオーバーを生成。
addons.descriptionKo: WellSaid Labs의 AI 음성 기술을 사용하여 텍스트에서 스튜디오급 고품질 보이스오버를 생성하세요. 다양한 사실적인 음성 아바타 중에서 선택하여 동영상, e러닝, 프레젠테이션을 위한 전문 나레이션을 만드세요.

addons.description: 電子名刺（vCard）を簡単に作成。連絡先情報をスマートに共有。
addons.descriptionEn: Create digital business cards (vCards) quickly and easily within Adobe Express. Share your contact information smartly by embedding vCard data in QR codes, making it effortless for others to save your details.
addons.descriptionJa: 電子名刺（vCard）を簡単に作成。連絡先情報をスマートに共有。
addons.descriptionKo: Adobe Express에서 디지털 명함(vCard)을 빠르고 쉽게 만드세요. QR코드에 vCard 데이터를 삽입하여 연락처 정보를 스마트하게 공유하고, 상대방이 손쉽게 정보를 저장할 수 있게 하세요.

addons.description: イベントの出欠確認フォームを作成。招待状に組み込めます。
addons.descriptionEn: Create RSVP forms for your events and embed them seamlessly into invitations designed in Adobe Express. Collect attendance responses efficiently and manage your guest list with an integrated, easy-to-use form solution.
addons.descriptionJa: イベントの出欠確認フォームを作成。招待状に組み込めます。
addons.descriptionKo: 이벤트를 위한 참석 확인 폼을 만들어 Adobe Express에서 디자인한 초대장에 원활하게 삽입하세요. 통합된 사용하기 쉬운 폼 솔루션으로 참석 응답을 효율적으로 수집하고 게스트 목록을 관리하세요.

addons.description: 多言語コンテンツの作成を支援。
addons.descriptionEn: Streamline the creation of multilingual content within Adobe Express. Translate and adapt your designs for different languages and regions, enabling you to reach a global audience with localized creative materials.
addons.descriptionJa: 多言語コンテンツの作成を支援。
addons.descriptionKo: Adobe Express에서 다국어 콘텐츠 제작을 간소화하세요. 다양한 언어와 지역에 맞게 디자인을 번역하고 조정하여 현지화된 크리에이티브 자료로 글로벌 시청자에게 도달하세요.
keywords: ローカライゼーション
keywordsJa: ローカライゼーション

addons.description: 手描きデザインをデジタル化します。
addons.descriptionEn: Convert hand-drawn sketches and analog designs into clean digital artwork within Adobe Express. Bring your physical concepts to life digitally with accurate vectorization and digitization tools.
addons.descriptionJa: 手描きデザインをデジタル化します。
addons.descriptionKo: Adobe Express에서 손으로 그린 스케치와 아날로그 디자인을 깔끔한 디지털 아트워크로 변환하세요. 정확한 벡터화 및 디지털화 도구로 물리적 개념을 디지털로 구현하세요.

addons.nameJa: テキスト背後エフェクト
addons.categoryJa: デザイン・テキスト効果
addons.description: テキストを画像の背後に配置する効果を作成。
addons.descriptionEn: Create the popular effect of placing text behind subjects in images within Adobe Express. Achieve professional depth-layered compositions where text weaves naturally behind foreground elements for striking visual results.
addons.descriptionJa: テキストを画像の背後に配置する効果を作成。
addons.descriptionKo: Adobe Express에서 이미지의 피사체 뒤에 텍스트를 배치하는 인기 있는 효과를 만드세요. 텍스트가 전경 요소 뒤로 자연스럽게 얽히는 전문적인 깊이감 있는 합성 구성으로 눈에 띄는 시각적 결과물을 만드세요.

addons.nameJa: タイポグラフィツール
addons.description: 高度なタイポグラフィツール。美しい文字組みを実現。
addons.descriptionEn: A powerful typography tool for Adobe Express that enables advanced text crafting. Achieve beautiful type compositions with fine control over kerning, leading, and other typographic details for polished, professional results.
addons.descriptionJa: 高度なタイポグラフィツール。美しい文字組みを実現。
addons.descriptionKo: Adobe Express를 위한 강력한 타이포그래피 도구로 고급 텍스트 제작을 지원합니다. 커닝, 행간 및 기타 타이포그래피 세부 사항을 세밀하게 제어하여 세련되고 전문적인 결과물을 위한 아름다운 타입 구성을 만드세요.

addons.description: AIでノイズを除去し、音声をクリアに。
addons.descriptionEn: Use AI to automatically remove background noise and audio artifacts from your recordings, delivering clean and professional-sounding audio. Ideal for voiceovers, podcasts, and video soundtracks in Adobe Express projects.
addons.descriptionJa: AIでノイズを除去し、音声をクリアに。
addons.descriptionKo: AI를 사용하여 녹음에서 배경 소음과 오디오 노이즈를 자동으로 제거하여 깔끔하고 전문적인 음질을 제공합니다. Adobe Express 프로젝트의 보이스오버, 팟캐스트, 동영상 사운드트랙에 이상적입니다.

addons.description: AIで動画の重要シーンを自動抽出。
addons.descriptionEn: Automatically extract the most important and engaging scenes from your videos using AI. Save time on manual editing by letting the AI identify highlights and key moments to build compelling short-form content.
addons.descriptionJa: AIで動画の重要シーンを自動抽出。
addons.descriptionKo: AI를 사용하여 동영상에서 가장 중요하고 흥미로운 장면을 자동으로 추출하세요. AI가 하이라이트와 주요 순간을 식별하여 매력적인 숏폼 콘텐츠를 만드는 데 드는 수동 편집 시간을 절약하세요.

addons.description: AIアバターを生成し、動画コンテンツに活用。
addons.descriptionEn: Generate realistic AI avatars and integrate them into your video content with HeyGen's technology. Create engaging spokesperson videos, virtual presentations, and digital human content without the need for on-camera talent.
addons.descriptionJa: AIアバターを生成し、動画コンテンツに活用。
addons.descriptionKo: HeyGen의 기술로 사실적인 AI 아바타를 생성하고 동영상 콘텐츠에 통합하세요. 카메라 앞 출연자 없이도 매력적인 대변인 동영상, 가상 프레젠테이션, 디지털 휴먼 콘텐츠를 만드세요.

addons.description: AI機能を提供（詳細は要確認）。
addons.descriptionEn: AKOOL AI provides a suite of artificial intelligence features for creative workflows. Leverage AI-powered tools to enhance, generate, and automate various aspects of your design projects in Adobe Express.
addons.descriptionJa: AI機能を提供（詳細は要確認）。
addons.descriptionKo: AKOOL AI는 크리에이티브 워크플로우를 위한 인공지능 기능 모음을 제공합니다. AI 기반 도구를 활용하여 Adobe Express 디자인 프로젝트의 다양한 측면을 향상, 생성, 자동화하세요.

addons.nameJa: Muzaic サウンドトラック
addons.description: AIで生成されたカスタムサウンドトラックを提供。
addons.descriptionEn: Access AI-generated custom soundtracks tailored to your project's mood and style. Muzaic creates unique, royalty-free music on demand so your Adobe Express videos and presentations always have the perfect audio backdrop.
addons.descriptionJa: AIで生成されたカスタムサウンドトラックを提供。
addons.descriptionKo: 프로젝트의 분위기와 스타일에 맞춰 AI가 생성한 맞춤형 사운드트랙에 접근하세요. Muzaic는 주문형으로 고유한 로열티 프리 음악을 만들어 Adobe Express 동영상과 프레젠테이션에 항상 완벽한 오디오 배경을 제공합니다.

addons.description: デザインのフィードバックと校正プロセスを効率化。
addons.descriptionEn: Streamline your design feedback and proofreading process with PageProof. Collect structured comments, track revisions, and manage the approval workflow for your Adobe Express designs all in one collaborative platform.
addons.descriptionJa: デザインのフィードバックと校正プロセスを効率化。
addons.descriptionKo: PageProof로 디자인 피드백과 교정 프로세스를 간소화하세요. 구조화된 의견을 수집하고, 수정 사항을 추적하며, 하나의 협업 플랫폼에서 Adobe Express 디자인의 승인 워크플로우를 관리하세요.

addons.descriptionEn: Generate a variety of 3D shapes, with different colours and rotations, and then add these to your Adobe Express designs. Now including a wider range of shapes including cylinders, pyramids, cones, toruses, spheres, and various polyhedra.
addons.descriptionJa: Generate a variety of 3D shapes, with different colours and rotations, and then add these to your Adobe Express designs. Now including a wider range of shapes including cylinders, pyramids, cones, toruses, spheres, and various polyhedra.

addons.descriptionEn:
Scan your Adobe Express designs for accessibility issues and fix them with one click. Accessibility Assistant checks for WCAG 2.1 compliance including color contrast, text size, and touch targets.

Features:
- Instant accessibility score (0-100) with WCAG AA/AAA badge
- One-click auto-fix for contrast and text size issues
- Multiple color suggestions per issue
- Color blindness preview (protanopia, deuteranopia, tritanopia)
- Undo any fix instantly
- Export reports as text or JSON
- Customizable thresholds in settings

How it works:
1. Click "Scan Design" to analyze your document
2. Review issues grouped by element with WCAG references
3. Click fix buttons or color swatches to resolve
4. Watch your score improve in real-time

Who it's for:
Designers, marketers, educators, and anyone creating visual content who wants to ensure their work is readable by people with visual impairments, color blindness, or other disabilities.

All processing happens locally

addons.descriptionEn:
Introducing the Accessibility Checker by UX Mate, your go-to tool for seamless color accessibility checks right within Adobe Express!

Here's how it works: simply select two objects in your design featuring solid colors you want to test. With just a click on 'Check Contrast,' the Accessibility Checker will analyze the selected colors and provide immediate feedback on their contrast ratio.

Not only does the Accessibility Checker save you time and effort, but it also ensures that your designs meet accessibility standards. By quickly identifying whether your color combinations pass AA and AAA standards, you can make informed decisions to enhance the accessibility of your designs.

Experience the convenience and efficiency

addons.descriptionEn:
Your go-to Adobe Express add-on for creating AI-generated images without the complexity of prompt engineering. Whether you're a professional designer or a creative enthusiast, The add-on makes it easy to produce high-quality visuals that suit your specific needs.

You can select from various ready-made templates and customize them through an intuitive user interface. Adjust prompt parameters like seasons, colors, background, and more using simple controls such as sliders, dropdown lists, and text inputs. Once you're happy with your customizations, click 'Generate' to instantly see your tailored images.

Designed with both ease of use and flexibility in mind, AI Background tables empowers you to create photorealistic images, backgrounds, and patterns quickly and efficiently, without any prior experience in AI or prompt engineering.

addons.descriptionEn:
✨ AI Carousel Maker: Create Viral Content in Seconds! ✨

Stop wasting hours designing slides. Turn any topic into high-conversion carousels for Instagram, LinkedIn, and TikTok in less than 1 min 🚀

🔥 Core Features:

• AI Smart Magic: Just enter a topic or link; AI generates perfectly structured content.
• Premium Templates: Modern, minimal, and bold layouts designed for maximum engagement.
• Dynamic Styling: 20+ curated color palettes and unique background patterns.
• Perfect Sizing: One-click resizing for Square (1:1), Portrait (4:5), or Story (9:16).
• Brand Voice: Customize the AI tone (Professional, Educational, Bold, or Friendly).
• Smart CTAs: Automatically add "Follow for More" or "Save this Post" end-slides.

🎨 Boost Your Growth: Perfect for creators, marketers, and educators looking to dominate the algorithm with professional, viral content.

addons.descriptionEn:
Transform any visual concept into production‑ready email code with AI. Simply upload a PNG/JPG of your desired layout—or type a prompt describing colors, layout blocks, and style—and our engine generates clean, responsive HTML/CSS you can preview, tweak in‑app, or export directly for use in any ESP.

Key Features

Image‑to‑Code: AI analyzes your uploaded template and recreates it as semantic, table‑based email HTML.

Prompt‑Driven: No image? No problem—describe your ideal email (“two‑column layout with hero banner and CTA button”) and get instant code.

Live Editor & Preview: Edit text, swap images, adjust styles, and see real‑time rendering across desktop & mobile.

Export Options: Copy code, download a ZIP, or integrate directly into your email platform or workflow.

Component Library: Prebuilt sections (headers, footers, product cards) you can drag‑and‑drop.

Whether you’re a marketer, designer, or developer, our app cuts production time from hours to seconds—no coding expertise req

Prompt‑Driven: No image? No problem—describe your ideal email (“two‑column layout with hero banner and CTA button”) and get instant code.

Live Editor & Preview: Edit text, swap images, adjust styles, and see real‑time rendering across desktop & mobile.

Export Options: Copy code, download a ZIP, or integrate directly into your email platform or workflow.

Component Library: Prebuilt sections (headers, footers, product cards) you can drag‑and‑drop.

Whether you’re a marketer, designer, or developer, our app cuts production time from hours to seconds—no coding expertise req

Bring creativity to your designs with ASCII Punk! This Adobe Express addon transforms any image into fully customizable ASCII art, giving your visuals a unique and artistic edge. Whether you're experimenting with image effects or crafting standout designs, ASCII Punk is here to inspire.

**Why Use ASCII Punk?**

1. Custom Backgrounds: Change the background color to complement your design.
2. Adjustable Precision: Resize character size to get the perfect level of detail.
3. Personalized Characters: Choose your own set of ASCII characters to make your art unique.

Designed for creative professionals and enthusiasts alike, ASCII Punk is a versatile tool for adding personality to your designs. Try it today and discover new ways to reimagine your images!

addons.descriptionEn:
Barcode Generator for designs in Adobe Express 📱✨

Instantly create professional, scannable barcodes directly within your designs! Whether you are designing product packaging, inventory labels, event tickets, or marketing materials, this add-on is your all-in-one solution. 🏷️📦

Key Features:

Multiple Formats: Supports popular standards like EAN-13, UPC-A, Code 128, Code 39, and many more. 📊
Fully Customizable: Adjust bar width, height, colors, and font styles to match your brand identity perfectly. 🎨
High Resolution: Generates crisp, vector-quality SVGs that scale without losing quality for print or digital use. 🖨️
Instant Preview: See your changes in real-time before adding them to your canvas. ⚡

Stop switching between external tools and streamline your workflow today. Perfect for small business owners, designers, and marketers looking to add functional data to their visuals effortlessly.

Try Barcode Generator now and make your designs scannable! 🚀

Stop wasting time on manual graphing. Our advanced Chart Builder transforms your raw spreadsheets into stunning, presentation-ready visuals in seconds. Perfect for business reports, social media infographics, and pitch decks.

Why Creators Love Us:
📊 Diverse Graph Types: Instantly generate Bar, Line, Pie, Doughnut, and Radar charts that fit your narrative.
🎨 Smart Styling: Automatically apply beautiful, designer-curated color palettes that match your brand identity.
⚡ One-Click Import: Upload CSV or Excel files for instant data mapping, no coding required!
✨ Premium Features: Unlock exclusive themes and advanced customization options to make your work truly stand out.

Make your data speak for itself. Simple enough for beginners, powerful enough for pros. Elevate your visual storytelling today! 📈✨

addons.descriptionEn:
Auto Icon is the ultimate add-on for Adobe Express, unlocking access to over 160,000 icons from popular fonts and emoji sets like Font Awesome 4 and 5, Material Design Icons, IonIcons, Vaadin Icons, Entypo+, and more. With a user-friendly interface, you can easily find and import perfect icons by dragging and dropping. Plus, Auto Icon comes with an open-source license, allowing commercial use without worry. Even better, Auto Icon includes 23,000 free icons to get you started on your creative journey. Take your designs to the next level with Auto Icon!

Auto Icon is packed with features to elevate your design game:

- Access over 160k icons, including 23k free, from popular open source icon packs.
- Choose from over 160 icon packs for ultimate flexibility in your designs.
- Find the perfect icon fast with accurate and speedy icon search.
- Apply icons seamlessly with the drag and drop feature.

Get Auto Icon for Adobe Express and take your designs to the next level!

addons.descriptionEn:
AutoReel creates perfect short clips from your long-form videos for social media—automatically.

Whether you have podcasts, interviews, webinars, or talks, AutoReel uses AI to find those golden moments that make people stop scrolling. Those deep insights, breakthrough conversations, controversial takes, hidden inspirations—all the engaging parts your audience craves.

Just paste your YouTube link and wait 2-3 minutes. That's it.

AutoReel's AI analyzes your entire video and automatically extracts the most compelling segments. The moments that spark conversation. The insights that get shared. The clips that go viral on YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, and TikTok.

Each clip comes with AI-generated titles and captions perfectly crafted for social media. No more struggling to write the perfect hook or caption.

You get multiple ready-to-post clips from a single video, helping you repurpose content faster and reach wider audiences without the endless editing grind.

addons.descriptionEn:
Background Noise Remover is a powerful yet easy-to-use tool designed to enhance your audio files by eliminating unwanted background noise. Whether you're working on podcasts, voiceovers, interviews, or any kind of audio recording, this tool helps you achieve cleaner, more professional sound in just a few clicks.

The tool intelligently detects and removes common background disturbances like static, hums, hisses, or ambient noise—so your voice or primary audio comes through crisp and clear. You can also fine-tune the audio to your liking with flexible features:

- Noise Duration: Adjust the length of time the tool analyzes background noise for more accurate removal, especially useful for long or variable recordings.

- Amplification Factor: Balance your audio levels with optional amplification to ensure the final result is loud and clear without distortion."

addons.descriptionEn: Teacup Software's BarcodeMaker for Adobe Express makes creating barcodes easier and faster than ever! With support for all major barcode types, including QR codes, you can design and customize barcodes to perfectly fit your needs. Whether you’re adding a sleek look with custom colors or ensuring every scan works flawlessly, BarcodeMaker has you covered. Your barcodes will be sized correctly automatically whether you're outputting to print or web. The simple interface means anyone can create professional-quality barcodes in just a few clicks. Ideal for businesses, creators, and anyone looking to streamline their workflow, this new version of BarcodeMaker takes your designs to the next level!

addons.descriptionEn:
With the Blob Maker Add-on for Adobe Express, generate unique blobs for your projects.
Choose from filled, outlined, gradient, stacked, dual, patterned, and blurred blobs—mix and match to create unique designs like black hole effects or intricate patterns.
Insert your vibrant generated blobs directly into your canvas project with a click
Fill & Outline: Change fill color, border color, and adjust border width with ease.

Pattern Blobs: Choose from over 180 patterns and adjust the pattern size to fit your design vision.

Gradient Blobs: Create complex gradients with up to 7 colors, selecting between linear or radial styles.

Blur Effects: Adjust blur intensity for dynamic and soft focus effects.

Shape Complexity: Fine-tune vertices and complexity to craft blobs that range from chaotic to smooth.

Copy & Customize SVG Code:

Easily copy the SVG code directly from the add-on for further reuse in code environment or other tools like illustrator.

addons.descriptionEn:
BrandGuard helps you ensure every design stays on-brand. Define your brand rules once — approved colors, fonts, logo placement, and spacing — then scan any design with one click to catch violations instantly.
How it works:
• Create a Brand Profile with your approved hex colors, font families, size ranges, and spacing rules
• Click "Check Compliance" to scan your current design
• See violations highlighted directly on canvas — wrong colors, unapproved fonts, logo too close to edges
• Get a compliance score showing how on-brand your design is
• Use Quick Fix to swap incorrect colors or fonts with approved alternatives
• Export a compliance report for approvals and audits
Built for marketing teams, brand managers, and anyone who needs consistent designs without manual checking. No accounts, no subscriptions — everything runs locally in your browser. Define unlimited brand profiles and run unlimited scans, completely free.

addons.descriptionEn:
With this Brandkit Add-on for Adobe Express. You can create awesome marketing and social media assets in Adobe Express — using Image, Video, Audio, and PDF assets from your Brandkit account via the Brandkit Add-on. Search for Assets in the Add-on, then just drag and drop onto your Adobe Express design canvas. You can also save your new completed Adobe Express files back to your Brandkit account via the Add-on.

A Brandkit account is required, and you will need a Brandkit API key, attached to a Brandkit User with access to Assets. 

Saving back to Brandkit is only possibly if your Brandkit User Role has appropriate Upload permissions in Brandkit.

addons.descriptionEn:
With Bulk Create and Generate, you can take a starting template or design in Adobe Express, and create variations of it in minutes by replacing your text and images. 

First, you must create your starting design. This should be a single page which you can create from scratch or use a template. All of your design variations will be based on this page, so now you can launch the add-on to continue. 

Second, Bulk Create and Generate will walk you through setting up a .csv template that will contain all of your design variation details. You'll indicate which images and text boxes you want to replace. 

Third, you'll provide the new content you want to use to replace your starting content in your downloaded .csv file. You can choose to replace content using locally stored images (referenced by their filename), text-to-image prompts, and text strings. 

Lastly, upload your finished .csv. Sit back and watch as the add-on turns your .csv file into dozens of new pages in minutes!

This add-on uses generative AI technology to create content. You are solely responsible for the use of the content, and Adobe is not responsible for your use of this add-on.

addons.descriptionEn:
Stop switching between Adobe Express and your DAM system. CI HUB Brand Connector brings your organization’s entire brand library & files directly into Express: Logos, product images, photography, illustrations, and brand colors, all accessible without breaking your creative flow.

Key Features:
- Universal Access: Connect to all major DAM systems, cloud storage, and brand libraries
- Multi-System Search: Find assets across all connected systems simultaneously
- Brand Panel: Quick access to pre-approved brand assets and colors
- Brand Check: Automatic detection of outdated or non-approved assets
- Spaces: Create project-specific collections with assets from multiple sources. Perfect for campaigns, clients, or ongoing projects
- Save time, maintain brand consistency, and keep your team focused on creating great content, not searching for files.

Works with Sitecore, Frontify, MediaValet, Box, Papirfly, Dropbox, SharePoint and many more added regularly.

addons.descriptionEn:
ClarityUX™: AI Heat-maps, Eye-Tracking & UX Insights for Marketeers and Designers.
Boost conversions and UX performance with predictive AI tools that analyze attention, accessibility, and usability in one seamless workflow.

ClarityUX™ is your AI design assistant for Adobe express. Instantly get heat-maps, WCAG compliance checks, visual hierarchy feedback, and actionable UX recommendations. 

Top Features:

📊 Design Analysis: Get AI-powered layout, hierarchy & flow suggestions

🔥 Attention Heat-maps: Predict where users focus, spot blind spots

🧠 UX Recommendations: Improve usability with research-backed tips

Benefits:

Automate reviews & save time

Create accessible, conversion-optimized designs

Make data-driven design decisions

Learn from AI to improve design instincts

addons.descriptionEn:
CSS Clip-Path Maker - Visual Shape Editor

Create stunning CSS clip-path shapes with visual editor and draggable handles

Transform your web designs with this powerful visual CSS clip-path generator. Create stunning geometric shapes, custom polygons, and complex clipping masks without writing code.

Key Features:

Image Gallery Selector - Choose from curated background images to preview your clip paths

Upload from Device - Test your shapes with your own images for perfect results

Editable Polygon Handles - Drag vertices to fine-tune your shapes in real-time

Complex Path Shapes - pre-built shapes: triangles, stars, arrows, frames, and more

HTML & CSS Code - Get clean, copy-ready CSS clip-path code instantly

SVG Code Support - Export shapes as SVG paths for maximum compatibility

Live Preview - See your changes instantly with real-time visual feedback

One-Click Copy - Copy CSS code to clipboard with a single click

Perfect for web designers, developers, and anyone looking to add un

addons.descriptionEn: Codify is an add-on for Adobe Express that turns your code into beautiful, shareable visual snippets. Whether you're a developer, educator, content creator, or student, Codify helps you create visually appealing code blocks for social posts, tutorials, portfolios, or presentations—without switching tools. Customize your snippet with themes, fonts, and background styles, then instantly add it to your Express project. It's a simple, elegant way to make your code stand out.

addons.descriptionEn:
Enhance your designs by transforming your photos into photo shape collages, photo grids, and seamless carousel posts.

Choose your collage layout:
• Shape collages and photo grids - arrange your photos into heart, moon, numbers, checkerboard, and more grids and organic shapes
• Seamless carousel posts - engage your audience by generating swipeable, panoramic photo layouts for your Instagram carousel posts

Upload and arrange your photos:
• Select the number of images needed for each layout
• Remove, replace, and shuffle your images to optimize your design

Generate your collage:
• Click “Generate” to add your collage to your Adobe Express design and continue editing and enhancing all of the images in your collage

addons.descriptionEn:
This add-on provides a collection of fun and expressive comic-style illustrations designed to enhance your Adobe Express creations.

With a single click, you can insert a variety of witty and emotional stickers directly onto your canvas — perfect for social media, storytelling, or casual communication. All assets are delivered in high-resolution PNG format with transparent backgrounds, making them easy to layer and combine with other design elements.

There’s no need for login or external services. Just start creating.

Features:
- Unique meme-inspired stickers
- Instant insertion into Adobe Express canvas
- Ideal for humor, reactions, and visual storytelling
- Lightweight, high-quality images

Make your content stand out with visual flair and expressive character!

addons.descriptionEn:
Specify separate fonts/sizes for each character category at once, such as Kanji, Kana, and numbers, and so on, like the composite font feature in Illustrator and InDesign. The settings are saved in the document.

# Create composite font

1. Specify font/size for each character category directly to the text on the artboard
2. Press Add button with it selected

You can get the setting text by executing “Place template text” from the icon menu in the add-on panel.

# Apply

1. Select a text frame on the artboard
2. Select target composite font on the panel

And it will be applied with one click.

# Export

1. Select target composite fonts on the panel
2. Select “Download composite fonts” from the menu in the add-on panel

# Import

1. Select “Import from composite font file” from the menu in the add-on panel 
2. Select JSON file in the dialog
3. Confirm that you indeed want to execute or not in the dialog

Then, items with matching composite font id are overwritten, and others are added.

addons.descriptionEn:
This add-on for Adobe transforms images into clean, reusable contour templates. It converts detailed photos or graphics into simplified line art by extracting only essential outlines and structural elements. The tool strips away colors, textures, shadows, and backgrounds, leaving uniform black strokes .

Perfect for creating design templates, brand variations, or base graphics for further customization.

addons.descriptionEn:
Unleash your creativity with our beginner-friendly, block-based programming! Automate tasks, create stunning graphics, and learn graphical coding with blocks.

🧩 Built with Blockly: Google’s library for intuitive, block-based programming.
🎨 Adobe Express Elements: Program with rectangles, ellipses, paths, images, text, lines, pages, and artboards.
📊 Data & Visuals: Use lists and images to enhance your creative projects.
🔄 Automate Creativity: Create, share, and chain together your library of scripts to streamline your Adobe Express workflow.
🛠️ Learn JavaScript coding: Code creatively with step-by-step learning tasks and earn a 🌟certificate at completion!
🖥️ User Interface: Easily create interfaces for input and output and have scripts call other scripts.
🖼️ Galeryst Integration: Add images from your Galeryst.com galleries.

Creative Coding is a free Adobe Express add-on crafted by Galeryst, a site that enabling anyone to create and share beautiful 3D virtual art galleries. 🌟

addons.descriptionEn: Discover Deep View, an AI-powered assistant that evaluates and refines your visual content. Whether you’re a designer perfecting a portfolio, a marketer crafting social media campaigns, or a business showcasing products, Deep View analyzes your images for balance, color accuracy, clarity, and brand alignment. In seconds, it delivers clear, prioritized recommendations—crop adjustments, exposure tweaks, color enhancements, or focus improvements—so you can address issues fast. Integrated with leading design platforms and workflows, it generates concise AI reports that track suggestions over time and enable seamless collaboration with your team. With Deep View, you eliminate guesswork, learn best practices as you go, and produce polished, impactful visuals every time. Try it today and elevate your imagery with confidence.

In seconds, it delivers clear, prioritized recommendations—crop adjustments, exposure tweaks, color enhancements, or focus improvements—so you can address issues fast. Integrated with leading design platforms and workflows, it generates concise AI reports that track suggestions over time and enable seamless collaboration with your team. With Deep View, you eliminate guesswork, learn best practices as you go, and produce polished, impactful visuals every time. Try it today and elevate your imagery with confidence.

addons.descriptionEn: Produce studio quality videos with your own life-like digital avatar, or our stock AI presenters. Simply type in text & generate videos in 30+ languages. Elevate your explainer videos, product demos, social media & other video content with DeepReel

addons.descriptionEn:
Design Buddy is your AI-powered assistant that reviews designs, guides you through improvements, and boosts your design confidence.

It assists in identifying often-missed flaws in your designs, ensuring they are polished before presenting to stakeholders like product managers, teams, or clients. This preemptive design review helps minimize the need for future revisions.

addons.descriptionEn:
Design to Email Export lets you convert Adobe Express designs into production-ready emails in just a few clicks. Select your design and export it as an email-friendly layout that preserves visuals, and clickable links, making it easy to share your work through email without manual rebuilding.

The add-on generates structured, email-safe output optimized for common email clients, ensuring links, buttons, and images work as expected. This makes it ideal for marketing emails, announcements, newsletters, and internal communications created directly in Adobe Express.

By removing the need for external tools or hand-coded templates, Design to Email Export streamlines the workflow from design to delivery.

addons.descriptionEn:
Design to HTML Export allows you to convert Adobe Express designs into standalone HTML files with ease. Select your design and export it as a self-contained web-ready output that preserves layout, visuals, text, and links, making it suitable for direct use on websites or local hosting.

The add-on generates clean, structured HTML optimized for portability and reuse. Images, links, and basic styling are maintained so the exported file can be opened in a browser, shared, or integrated into existing web projects without additional tooling.

Design to HTML Export removes the need to manually rebuild designs in code, streamlining the workflow from visual design to web output. It is ideal for landing pages, simple web content, previews, and prototypes created directly in Adobe Express.

addons.descriptionEn: Turn any TV into live digital signage—directly from Adobe Express. Directable TV lets you design content in Adobe Express and instantly publish updates to your TVs with one click. No USB drives, no reprinting, no complex setup. Runs on Amazon Fire OS devices, Fire TV Sticks, the Amazon Signage Stick, and Android / Google TV televisions and media players. Manage one screen or hundreds from a single cloud dashboard with unlimited slides, playlists, and scheduling. Ideal for schools, nonprofits, restaurants, offices, and events. Nonprofits get 25% off. Start with a free trial—no credit card required. Create in Adobe Express. Publish to your TVs instantly.

addons.descriptionEn:
Double Exposure lets you blend a subject photo with a texture or background image to create professional double-exposure artwork directly in Adobe Express.

How it works: Upload your main image (portrait or subject) and a second image (nature, city, patterns, or any texture). The add-on composites them so the subject’s silhouette reveals the texture inside it, giving you a single artistic image.

Features:
• Two-image workflow: main subject + texture/background
• Silhouette-based blending for clean double-exposure results
• Brush tools: erase, reveal, lighten, and darken for fine control over where the texture shows
• Transform controls: move, scale, and rotate the texture
• Vignette and edge refinement for a polished look
• Toning layer and canvas background options
• All editing happens inside the add-on panel in Adobe Express

Use it for posters, social covers, album art, or any visual content. No extra software—everything runs in your browser within Adobe Express.

addons.descriptionEn:
Drop-a-Map lets you instantly generate map images from any address and place them directly into your Adobe Express designs.
No more screenshots or external tools—just one click to visualize any location beautifully.

You can easily adjust visual elements such as map style, aspect ratio, border, and marker options.
Combine a background map and a zoomed-in map to create clear, informative layouts in seconds.
Choose from shapes like square, circle, or polygon, and add a name tag area below the map to display place names or short descriptions.

Preview your design in real time within Express, and reuse generated maps as templates to save time on repeated work.
Drop-a-Map goes beyond simply showing a location—it helps you tell a story through place and design.

(Use cases)
- Event, class, or exhibition posters
- Store opening or branch promotional designs
- Invitations with location maps
- Real estate or service area visualization

addons.descriptionEn:
Enhance your design process with the Easy Barcode plugin, your ultimate tool for hassle-free barcode creation. Whether you’re a seasoned designer or just starting out, Easy Barcode simplifies the process with powerful features and intuitive usability.

Why Choose Easy Barcode?

	•	Effortless Integration: This plugin leverages the robust JsBarcode library, enabling you to generate and insert barcodes directly into your designs without leaving your workspace.
	•	Support for Multiple Barcode Formats: Create high-quality, industry-standard barcodes like Code128, EAN-13, UPC-A, and more, ensuring compatibility with your business or project needs.
	•	Full Customization: Adjust dimensions, colors, and other parameters with ease. Personalize barcodes to seamlessly fit your design aesthetic.
	•	Real-time Previews: View and refine your barcode designs instantly, eliminating guesswork and ensuring a flawless outcome.

With Easy Barcode, transform barcode generation into a fast, efficient, and cre

addons.descriptionEn: Enhance your Adobe Express design with this simple yet powerful Emoji Finder. This add-on allows users to quickly search and insert emojis from popular sets, including Google, Apple, Fluent, and Twemoji. Whether you're designing graphics, presentations, or social media content, this tool provides a seamless way to add fun and expressive emojis to your creations. With an intuitive search feature, you can find the perfect emoji in seconds, making your workflow faster and more creative. Compatible with Adobe Express, this add-on integrates effortlessly, offering a wide variety of high-quality emojis to suit any style or mood. Perfect for designers, marketers, and creators looking to add a playful touch to their work. Start exploring a world of emojis and elevate your designs today!

addons.descriptionEn:
The Ephoto Dam Add-on for Adobe Express lets you directly access your digital assets managed in Ephoto Dam, right from your creative workspace. This streamlines media usage for content creators by removing the need to switch interfaces.

Ephoto Dam becomes the single source of truth for all media. You can manage the entire content lifecycle within your DAM and provide Adobe Express users with the right media at the right time through a dedicated extension.

To optimize the media lifecycle, users can insert assets without opening the Ephoto Dam interface.

Fully integrated into Adobe Express, the add-on follows its design codes and logic, ensuring a smooth adoption by your teams.

Streamline your creative process with the Ephoto Dam ecosystem.

addons.descriptionEn:
Cultural missteps can be costly and damage your brand. This add-on acts as your AI-powered cultural sensitivity specialist, right inside Adobe Express. It analyzes your design elements or uploaded images to flag potential cultural, ethical, or symbolic issues before you publish.

Key Features:

• Instant Cultural Score: Get a clear 0-100 score to quickly assess your design’s appropriateness.
• Context-Aware Analysis: Receive tailored feedback based on your target country and business type for highly relevant insights.
• Actionable AI Feedback: Understand why an element might be inappropriate and get constructive suggestions for improvement.
• Canvas & Image Analysis: Check selected elements directly on your canvas or upload a full image for a comprehensive review.
• Follow-Up Chat: Have more questions? Ask the AI for clarifications or alternative ideas directly after receiving your analysis.

Design with confidence and ensure your creative resonates worldwide!

addons.descriptionEn:
Flat Icons is a graphic design company based in the Netherlands. We’re a tight team of 20 creative individuals working hard to design pixel-perfect products.
Founded in 2014, we’ve grown together with our users. Our community is our most valuable asset – we help fellow designers and creatives solve their biggest problems.
In almost a decade of existence, we’ve created more than 150,000 assets that are today used by individuals and companies worldwide. Our portfolio includes  2D icons, 3D icons, animations, illustrations, kits, fonts, and presentation templates.

addons.descriptionEn:
Flip n' Find is a fun and interactive memory game designed to challenge and entertain players of all ages. The objective is simple: flip two cards at a time, and try to find matching pairs. If the cards match, they stay revealed; if not, they flip back over. The key to winning is remembering the positions of the cards and using that knowledge to complete the board.

With vibrant animations, smooth gameplay, and a simple interface, Flip n' Find is perfect for casual gamers or anyone looking to improve their memory. The game offers an enjoyable way to boost cognitive skills while having fun, whether playing solo or challenging friends to beat the highest score.

Its intuitive design makes it easy to play, but it requires sharp focus and concentration to master. From kids to adults, Flip n' Find provides a delightful mix of entertainment and brain training that keeps you coming back for more!

addons.descriptionEn:
Find great font combinations without the guesswork.

Browse curated font pairings for products, landing pages, blogs, branding, posters, and docs. Each pairing includes a heading and body font with a live preview so you can see how it looks before using it.

Filter by category and tone (friendly, neutral, bold, editorial), preview in a playground card, then copy font names and apply them to your design.

No random generators — just thoughtfully selected font pairs that work.

Perfect for designers, developers, marketers, and creators who want better typography fast.

addons.descriptionEn:
Fun Voice Maker is a playful audio add-on for Adobe Express that lets users record or upload voice clips and instantly transform them into funny or dramatic character voices using real-time voice effects. 
Choose from a range of creative filters like: 
Helium voice – High-pitched chipmunk fun 
Zombie voice – Creepy, distorted undead growls 
Darth Vader voice – Deep, dark and heavy breathing effect 
Minion voice – Playful gibberish style inspired by the animated characters 
You can record live with real-time preview or upload voice clips already in your Adobe Express project. The modified voice can then be added back into your designs, videos, or social posts—all without leaving the browser.

addons.descriptionEn:
Galeryst generates 3D virtual galleries from images you upload and Adobe Photoshop Lightroom albums.
Create and share a gallery in seconds from artwork created in Adobe Express.

🎨 Export Artwork: Create galleries from the artwork you create in Adobe Express. Add artwork from Adobe Express to your existing galleries on Galeryst.com.
🖼️ Import Artwork: Place images in onto Adobe Express pages from the artwork exhibited in your galleries.
👓 Browse your 3D galleries and take screenshots to place on your Adobe Express pages.

-- Galeryst.com --
• Generate galleries from Adobe Photoshop Lightroom albums, images you upload directly, or from Adobe Express.
• Customize your galleries with different materials, layouts, and card designs.
• Create narrated tours of your galleries.
• Create drop-ship products from your artworks like posters and canvas prints to earn revenue from the artwork exhibited in your gallery.
• Share your galleries on computers, tablets, phones and in VR headsets.

addons.descriptionEn: GlowUp brings dynamic, studio-like lighting control right inside Adobe Express. Instantly adjust the mood and tone of your images with realistic light overlays, shadows, and highlights — no need for complex editing tools. Choose from presets like soft daylight, cinematic tones, or dramatic spotlights, or manually fine-tune light direction, intensity, and color temperature. Perfect for creators, designers, and marketers who want to make their visuals pop in seconds. GlowUp helps transform ordinary photos into captivating, professional-quality visuals — all within Express.

addons.descriptionEn:
Sync your Google Ads account with Adobe Express to create compelling Google Performance Max campaigns. Design new assets, edit existing campaigns from your library, or use an Adobe Express ad template for a head-start. Then simply export right into Google Ads Manager. Publish with confidence across all of Google’s platforms, including Display, Search, Discover, Gmail, and Maps. YouTube publishing coming soon.

Note: This add-on is provided by Adobe for the purposes of connecting to your Google Ads account. As a user, you are subject to the terms and privacy policies of both Adobe and Google.

For support, contact Adobe using the support link provided.

This add-on's use and transfer of information received from Google APIs to any other app will adhere to Google API Services User Data Policy, including the Limited Use requirements (https://developers.google.com/terms/api-services-user-data-policy).

Google Ads is a trademark of Google LLC

addons.descriptionEn:
Level up your content with Hoopr add-on for Adobe Express!
Instantly dive into a wide library of copyright-safe music perfect for videos, reels, stories, and graphics without ever leaving Adobe Express.
Whether you’re a creator, brand, or business, finding the perfect soundtrack is now effortless. With seamless integration, you can search, preview, and drop tracks straight into your projects, saving time while keeping your content takedown-free.

Key Features:
- Spot-on search: Smart tags find the perfect track fast—no endless scrolling.
- India in every beat: Genres that capture the nation’s full sonic vibe, from indie calm to fusion fire.
- Any project, perfectly soundtracked: From vlogs to ads, a pro catalog built to match every mood.
- Add instantly: Drop the right track in seconds and speak to your audience in a voice they know.

addons.descriptionEn:
What it is: Img Crafter AI is an AI-powered add-on designed to work alongside Adobe Express for image creation and editing.

Generate images: Create original images from text prompts with selectable styles, aspect ratios, and multiple variations.

Edit images: Upload an image and edit using natural-language instructions.

Upscale: Improve image clarity, sharpness, and detail with AI upscaling.

OCR / Text extraction: Extract text from images and documents, including printed + handwritten text, with structured document-style transcription.

Mimic / Style reference: Generate new images guided by a style reference image + prompt.

Color palette tools: Extract dominant colors and generate design suggestions for use cases.

Adobe Express workflow: Add generated results directly to the canvas and use drag-to-document for fast layout.

Monetization (credits): Credit-based usage with welcome free credits, pre-check + real-time deduction, and top-ups.
addons.descriptionJa:
What it is: Img Crafter AI is an AI-powered add-on designed to work alongside Adobe Express for image creation and editing.

Generate images: Create original images from text prompts with selectable styles, aspect ratios, and multiple variations.

Edit images: Upload an image and edit using natural-language instructions.

Upscale: Improve image clarity, sharpness, and detail with AI upscaling.

OCR / Text extraction: Extract text from images and documents, including printed + handwritten text, with structured document-style transcription.

Mimic / Style reference: Generate new images guided by a style reference image + prompt.

Color palette tools: Extract dominant colors and generate design suggestions for use cases.

Adobe Express workflow: Add generated results directly to the canvas and use drag-to-document for fast layout.

Monetization (credits): Credit-based usage with welcome free credits, pre-check + real-time deduction, and top-ups.

addons.descriptionEn: Use this add-on to import an image from your phone or tablet, by scanning a QR code. The image can then be viewed in the add-on preview display and added to your Adobe Express design.

addons.descriptionEn: Insight Wizard is your personal data storyteller inside Adobe Express. Drop in any CSV, or tab‑delimited file and, in seconds, the add‑on’s Gemini‑powered engine scans every row, detects trends and outliers, and returns a publication‑ready narrative. You’ll receive a punchy title, one‑paragraph summary, themed sections (achievements, financial highlights, risks, outlook, etc.) and a clear conclusion—perfect for presentations, social graphics or stakeholder reports. Adjust the built‑in “Creativity Level” slider to switch tone from formal to conversational (or even Shakespearean!), choose your output language, and Insight Wizard rewrites instantly. No formulas, no pivot tables: just upload and get insight. Works with Express templates so you can drag the generated copy straight onto the canvas, pair it with auto‑suggested charts, and publish in minutes. Turn raw data into compelling stories—right where your design work already lives.

addons.descriptionEn:
Find the best hashtags and generate the most engaging captions for your social media posts. 

This add-on is a powerful tool designed to enhance your social media presence. With the IQ Hashtags plugin you can easily optimize your posts and boost your social media engagement.

Find the most effective hashtags. Hashtags are still one of the most effective ways to increase your online visibility. Find new hashtags for your Instagram and TikTok posts to attract more people, bring in more traffic, and make your projects seen by a larger audience.

Say goodbye to generic or uninspiring captions. The plugin uses advanced artificial intelligence algorithms to create unique and engaging captions for your posts. They will resonate with your target audience!

For hashtags, just type in one hashtag (or keyword), and our tool will arm you with the best hashtag choices to increase your social media visibility organically. The results will surprise you!

addons.descriptionEn:
IRASUTOYA is an illustration collection produced by Mr. Takashi Mifune and is widely known to Japanese audiences. His collection is the most successful in the Japanese visual market and covers various topics, such as Japanese seasonal events, lifestyle, and adorable characters. etc.  
  
This add-on enables you to access pre-selected illustrations with more on his website. Though his illustrations can be used for free, you may need to pay the licensing fee to Irasutoya for some specific usages. Please read the Terms of Use of Irastoya carefully in advance.

addons.descriptionEn:
The JamPad Mini Add-on provides band sounds and animal sounds. Depending on the values entered by the user, an audio file is recorded, and once the recording is complete, it can be added to the current page.

To offer a variety of sound effects, a Reverb control UI is provided. Keyboard input is also supported based on each Pad button's position, delivering an experience similar to an actual JamPad Mini.

addons.descriptionEn:
Japanese Ruby Add-on
Automatically analyzes selected Japanese text and adds ruby (furigana) above kanji using morphological analysis powered by Kuromoji. Ideal for making Japanese text easier to read in Adobe Express documents.

addons.descriptionEn:
Ditch lorem ipsum forever! Jargonator uses AI to generate realistic copy to fit your designs and give it a much more accurate and professional feel. This add-on is integrated with your AI of choice and allows you to precisely control the amount of text generated, including the tone and content. Add detailed directions to the model to fine-tune your text via the settings panel. This AI-powered add-on is so quick and easy at creating realistic text, there’s no excuse to use lorem ipsum as a placeholder ever again!

Currently, this add-on is provided for free by Savas Labs, however you are required to enter your own API key.

addons.descriptionEn:
A curated collection of high-quality Korean food photos, provided by the Korea Agro-Fisheries & Food Trade Corporation under the KOGL Type 1 (Attribution) license.
Commercial use and modification are permitted with proper credit.

Bring the authentic flavors of Korea to Adobe Express.
This collection features images inspired by traditional Korean cuisine, provided under the Korea Open Government License, Type 1 (Attribution)—which allows commercial use and modification with appropriate attribution.
Perfect for posters, packaging, social media posts, presentations, and educational materials.

- Includes popular Korean dishes such as kimchi, bulgogi, gimbap, and tteokbokki
- Features main dishes, side dishes, beverages, desserts, and more
- Suitable for branding, cultural projects, and education
 
- License: KOGL Type 1 (Attribution)
- Attribution example: “Source: Korea Agro-Fisheries & Food Trade Corporation, KOGL Type 1”

addons.descriptionEn:
kStylo AI Hairstyle is an AI-powered hairstyle simulation service.
Upload a single selfie and experience a variety of popular Korean hairstyles—whether it's a trendy bob, long waves, perms, or vibrant colors.
With just a few clicks, you can naturally apply different looks without any complicated steps.
Perfect for users considering a hair makeover, content creators, and beauty professionals who need style suggestions.
Transform your image with high-quality, realistic simulations inspired by K-culture trends, and find your next hairstyle effortlessly.

addons.descriptionEn:
kStylo is an AI-powered profile photo generator.
Simply upload a single selfie and get a natural, polished, and eye-catching portrait in seconds.
Using advanced AI, kStylo transforms your photo into a variety of stylish looks—whether it’s a trendy K-pop vibe, a traditional Hanbok concept, or a relaxed casual style.
With just one click, experience the beauty of K-culture in your own profile.
 Perfect for social media users, content creators, job seekers, designers, and anyone who wants to express their unique style with high-quality profile images.

addons.descriptionEn:
kStylo Bridal Dress is an AI-powered profile photo generator add-on. Simply upload a single selfie to experience yourself in the elegant beauty of traditional Korean women's wedding attire. This add-on creates graceful, full-body portraits inspired by Korea's royal bridal heritage, featuring the iconic Hwarot—a richly embroidered ceremonial robe.
Using advanced AI, kStylo Bridal Dress also offers various filters, including K-pop styles, modern Hanbok concepts, and business profiles, allowing you to express your unique identity.
With just a few clicks, you can style your most brilliant moment and capture the beauty of K-culture in your own profile.
Perfect for users wanting a special profile, soon-to-be-brides, and anyone interested in traditional Korean culture.

addons.descriptionEn:
The Layer Manager Add-on for Adobe Express gives you complete control over your design workflow. Managing multiple layers in complex projects has never been this simple, fast, and intuitive.

With Layer Manager, you can:
✔️ Organize layers into folders and groups for clean structure
✔️ Search and instantly locate any layer
✔️ Add labels and notes to keep designs organized
✔️ Toggle visibility or hide layers with a single click
✔️ Rename layers directly and seamlessly
✔️ Select and manage multiple layers at once
✔️ Reorder layers with effortless drag-and-drop
✔️ Use color labels and tags for quick recognition

Designed with both professionals and everyday creators in mind, Layer Manager brings clarity and speed to even the most complex Adobe Express designs. Whether you’re working on detailed client projects or personal creative work, this Add-on saves time, reduces clutter, and makes editing more efficient.

Streamline your design process, stay organized, and experience a smarter

addons.descriptionEn:
LinkrUI: Synchronizes assets between Adobe Express as well as, Microsoft Office applications: Word, PowerPoint and Excel, Google Workspace applications: Docs, Sheets and Slides, Adobe Creative Cloud applications: Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, Premiere Pro, and After Effects to each other and with Digital Asset Management systems and other hosted storage hubs.

LinkrUI for Office requires a subscription to use. Subscriptions can be purchased from https://santacruzsoftware.com/linkrui/ or through one of our partners. For a list of partners or for site licenses, please contact us.

addons.descriptionEn:
Lottie2Video is a powerful and seamless add-on for Adobe Express that lets users convert lightweight .json-based Lottie animations into standard video files (MP4) that are instantly importable into their Express projects. 

With this tool, users no longer need to use external rendering tools or code-based workflows. Simply upload a Lottie file, preview the animation, choose settings (like background color, size and duration), and export it as a high-resolution video — all within Adobe Express.

addons.descriptionEn:
Enhance your photos and designs with a curated library of professional LUTs built for fast, consistent color grading. 

LUT Master gives you an intuitive workflow with Live Preview, adjustable blend strength, and one-click Smart Replace, so you can swap looks instantly without stacking extra layers. 

Use Auto Apply for quick matching, explore styles through organized packs, and hit the Randomizer to discover unexpected color vibes in seconds for grading combinations.

addons.descriptionEn: “Lyrics to Melody” uses AI to analyze your song lyrics and generate a matching musical melody. All generated music is royalty-free for commercial and personal use.

addons.descriptionEn:
Send designs and templates from Adobe Express to your MailerLite File Manager.

Now you can sync designs between MailerLite and Adobe Express in just a few clicks. Use this feature alongside our revamped email editor to create beautiful emails faster than ever.

It's simpler and faster to build your designs with Adobe Express and use them in a MailerLite newsletter or website. Or you can quickly export designs saved in your MailerLite File Manager and start working on them in Adobe Express.

addons.descriptionEn:
Mask Maker is a simple yet powerful add-on that allows you to create stylish image masks directly inside Adobe Express. With an intuitive workflow, users can upload their own images, choose from a curated library of shape masks, and instantly apply the selected mask — no need to leave the platform or use external tools.

Perfect for creatives, marketers, and social media designers who want to elevate their designs with clean, custom-masked imagery. The initial version is free to use and includes a growing library of shape masks. More advanced and premium features are planned in future updates.

addons.descriptionEn:
MaskMaster is the first fully customizable image masking tool designed exclusively for Adobe Express — enabling seamless masking over PNGs, text, logos, and canvas elements without ever leaving the platform.

MaskMaster was developed in response to widespread user frustration around the lack of masking functionality in Express. Our research-driven approach uncovered a critical gap — designers were forced to switch tools or platforms just to achieve basic masking. We fixed that.

With MaskMaster, users can:
 - Mask images and videos(soon) into custom shapes, logos, and canvas elements
 - Create outer layers around objects
 - Upload their own PNGs or use canvas objects as crop boundaries
 - Adjust positioning interactively with real-time previews

Steps:
1. Object selection
   Either Load an element from the canvas or upload an object png with a transparent background to use as cropping later.
2. Mask Image and adjust placement/size
3. Add to Canvas

addons.descriptionEn:
MATE Text is your AI-powered assistant for all text-related tasks. It helps you to provide texts without spelling mistakes or translate them, or rewrite them with the click of a button.

How it works:
1. Select one or multiple text objects
2. Pick an action (e.g. "fix grammar")
3. Click "Generate" and your texts will be replaced with the new version

All Actions:
- Fix grammar
- Translations (30 languages)
- Rewrite
- Shorten
- Lengthen
- Summarize

Developed with usability in mind, it caters to a wide range of users, from students and educators to professionals in scientific fields who frequently work with mathematical equations.

3. 170+ Symbol
4. Realtime Preview

addons.descriptionEn:
Enhance your digital strategy with the Metricool Analytics integration. This add-on provides detailed performance tracking across your connected platforms, helping you monitor the success of your content, social media, and web presence. Get real-time and historical analytics data, view audience growth, engagement trends, and platform-specific metrics, all in one place.

With this integration, you'll be able to access:

- Website traffic and behavior reports
- Social media analytics (followers, impressions, reach)
- Post performance tracking
- Audience insights across networks
- Historical data comparisons for smarter decisions

Gain a better understanding of what’s working, identify growth opportunities, and make data-informed decisions to boost your online performance.

Simple setup, real-time updates, and clear reporting. Everything you need to stay on top of your digital metrics with ease.

addons.descriptionEn: The Microsoft SharePoint add-on with Adobe Express is designed to streamline the workflow of professionals by enabling direct access, editing, and management of SharePoint assets within Adobe Express. With this add-on, teams can: enhance efficiency by reducing the time to locate and modify digital assets, improve collaboration by providing a unified platform for managing shared assets, and maintain consistency across platforms. This add-on allows you to access SharePoint sites, edit assets, and save them directly back to SharePoint, ensuring a seamless integration between the two platforms. Installation is easy through the Adobe Express Add-ons Marketplace.

addons.descriptionEn:
Mockup Hive helps designers, creators, and marketers bring their ideas to life with professional-quality mockups directly inside Adobe Express. With an intuitive editor, you can place your designs into realistic product shots, digital screens, packaging, and more — all without leaving your workflow.

The Add-on supports advanced features like precision masking, smart object placement, and mesh-based warping for perfectly aligned results. Every mockup adapts seamlessly, whether it’s for branding, social media, client presentations, or e-commerce product displays.

Built for speed and simplicity, Mockup Hive ensures stable, flicker-free rendering and smooth editing, giving you studio-level results in minutes.

Whether you’re a designer looking to save time or a business owner wanting professional visuals without expensive software, Mockup Hive makes creating eye-catching mockups simple, fast, and accessible.

addons.descriptionEn:
Easy-to-use add-on for creating beautiful neumorphic shapes shadow effects.

Customize shadows, auto-gradient generator to match color and light, modify the shape to see how it behaves in different border radius and sizes to achieve sleek, modern designs with a few clicks.

1. Generate the shadow
2. Insert the primitive shape to Adobe Express (Native shape when no gradient is applied)
3. Create different shapes with different radius and shadows directions for a creative design

Features:
- Customizable Light Source.
- Shadow Intensity Control.
- Background color picker.
- Neumorphic Shape Customization.
- Corner Radius Control.
- Dynamic Box Shadows Distance and Blur.
- CSS Code generation.
- User-friendly interface.

addons.descriptionEn:
Create Professional Barcodes Directly in Express – 159+ Formats Supported

Next Barcode Suite is the most powerful and comprehensive barcode generator for Adobe Express. Generate production-ready, standards-compliant barcodes directly inside Express—no external tools, no file imports, no workflow interruptions.

Designed for professional designers, publishers, and production teams, Next Barcode Suite supports 159+ barcode formats with advanced customization, live preview, and instant insertion.

✔ Create barcodes directly inside Adobe Express
✔ 159+ barcode formats (1D, 2D, GS1, postal, pharmaceutical, industrial)
✔ Professional customization controls
✔ High-quality vector output (SVG)
✔ One-time purchase — no subscription

Whether you’re designing product packaging, shipping labels, books, tickets, pharmaceutical labels, or marketing materials, Next Barcode Suite delivers reliable, print-ready results every time.

addons.descriptionEn:
Elevate your creative projects with NFA Characters by MUSTGAMES! This diverse collection features charmingly reborn endangered and familiar animals from Korea and around the world.
Standing for 'Non-Fungible Animals', NFA is a special project designed to raise awareness for our planet's most precious creatures. Each character comes with multiple skins, making it easy to add the perfect personality and vitality to any design concept.
The materials are free for personal, non-commercial use. For commercial use by corporations, businesses, or public institutions, a paid license is required. Please review the MUSTGAMES Terms of Use carefully.

This plugin automatically generates square and triangle box layouts, making it easy to create 3D boxes from 2D designs.

Auto Layout Conversion: The plugin unfolds your box shapes, adding fold lines and tabs to make assembly straightforward.

Simple Assembly: Just fold along the lines, glue the tabs, and your box is ready to go!
Templates will be added in the future for even more customization options.
